content: Hi Erik — locking the February deliverables for the retainer: two feed posts plus a story set. I want to shoot the dairy-free overnight-oats set this week while the morning light still works in my Williamsburg space. Good to proceed?
Go ahead, Jesse. Keep the barista oat carton in frame for at least one of the two posts. Marco will send the updated logo lockup so you're not pulling from last season's brand file.
Shoot done. Posts and stories are in the approvals channel for sign-off. Captions are drafted but light — flag anything you want reworded before they go live and I'll turn them around same day.
Both posts approved as-is. Tighten the second caption — drop the word "creamy," we keep that off dairy-adjacent copy. Otherwise ship it.
Caption fixed and both posts scheduled. March invoice for the $1,500 retainer is going out today, net-30. Let's pencil the spring recipe shoot for the second half of the month.
